description: Focuses on interpreting data, generating reports, and building dashboards to help businesses make data-driven decisions. Relies heavily on SQL, Excel, and BI tools like Tableau or PowerBI.
Builds predictive models and conducts advanced statistical analysis to solve complex business problems. Uses Python/R, Machine Learning, and Big Data technologies.
Bridges the gap between Data Science and Software Engineering. Focuses on deploying, optimizing, and scaling machine learning models in production environments.
Designs and builds the infrastructure and pipelines that collect, store, and process large volumes of data. Heavy emphasis on cloud platforms, distributed systems, and SQL.
Pushes the boundaries of artificial intelligence by inventing new algorithms and architectures. Requires deep mathematical knowledge and often a PhD.
